longDescription: Disk Status shows how full a disk or volume is directly on your Ulanzi Deck button — the amount of space in use, how much is still free, and a color-coded bar (green/yellow/orange/red) that fills as the disk gets fuller. Each button has its own dropdown listing every mounted volume, including external SSDs/HDDs, so you can watch several disks at once across different buttons. Values refresh on their own and the moment you click.
